SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
CacheAware<T>
Interface representing a cache-aware component for managing service and model caches.
DirectoryModelFinder
The DirectoryModelFinder class is responsible for finding model files in a given directory on the classpath.
ExceptionAware
The ExceptionAware interface provides a mechanism for handling exceptions and returning appropriate gRPC error responses to clients.
ModelAware<T>
The ModelAware interface defines behavior for services that are aware of model management and provides functionalities for accessing and handling cached models.
ModelFinderUtil
Utility class for scanning and loading models.
OpenNLPServer
The OpenNLPServer class implements a gRPC server for providing OpenNLP-based services.
PosTaggerService
The PosTaggerService class implements a gRPC service for Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging using Apache OpenNLP models.
SentenceDetectorService
The SentenceDetector class implements a gRPC service for sentence detection using Apache OpenNLP models.
ServiceException
 
TokenizerService
The Tokenizer class implements a gRPC service for tokenization using Apache OpenNLP models.
